comment.body:
ADP numbers were super bad today morning. Expectation was for 35K jobs to be created in August and just 4K were created and that is a six sigma miss. Given no NFP numbers, street was watching these with interest. Now it locks in 50bps cut in November and December. Equities love this environment. Shutdown they don't care, Inflation they don't care given that companies are passing on burden. 

Moar rate cuts and more devaluation of the dollar. Put simply your dollar fetches much less and all risky assets including Crypto will soar. 

By design thanks to the admin and Bessent. Fighting the tape is futile, just follow the trend until it changes.

comment.body: There is an uptick in speculative hedging that has popped up in the second half of Sept. absolute put floor of 600 but looks like a pullback target of 635. Thats at least what instituions look positioned for. But no sort of anomaly detected that would look like Feb 21, yen carry unwind Geo's in april of last year. Those did have a lot of positioning build up before hand (uptick on hedging). Im not seeing any sort of sustained correction down more like a 5% pullback before a launch higher toward 720 by EOY

comment.body: Hi Alma, what data can help determine   a range bounding day vs a momentum day? Is it the speed profile? OI? Something else? Thanks in advance
comment.raw_body: Hi Alma, what data can help determine   a range bounding day vs a momentum day? Is it the speed profile? OI? Something else? Thanks in advance

comment.body:
hard to explain...
no exact answer, very context dependent.
in a momentum day, it's like less red lights on the way up or down...
speed profile as well yepp, but today for example, the upside range was way more free as i described premarket.
downside was heavily bid, due to hedging. when market decided to trade above the centroid right after the opening, it was clear, that those puts will be closed = buyback flow... as it was written.
and the was no resistance to the upside today...
